name: ME-05 | Meeting Booking Confirmation + Prep Flow

nodes.name: Webhook - New Booking
nodes.notes: SETUP: Connect this to your booking tool's webhook. Works with: Calendly (paste this URL in Calendly → Integrations → Webhooks), Cal.com, TidyCal, or any scheduling tool that fires webhooks on new bookings.

nodes.name: Normalize Booking Data
nodes.notes: Handles Calendly webhook format and generic formats. CUSTOMIZE: Add more platform-specific parsers if needed.

parameters.subject: ✅ Confirmed: {{ $json.meetingTitle }} on {{ $json.formattedDate }}
parameters.message:
You're booked! 🎉

Here are your meeting details:

{{ $json.meetingUrl ? "" : '' }}
📅 Date {{ $json.formattedDate }}
⏰ Time {{ $json.formattedTime }} ({{ $json.timezone }})
📋 Meeting {{ $json.meetingTitle }}
🔗 Join Link" + $json.meetingUrl + "

📝 How to prepare

  • [REPLACE_WITH_PREP_TIP_1]
  • [REPLACE_WITH_PREP_TIP_2]
  • Have any questions you want answered ready
{{ $json.cancelUrl || $json.rescheduleUrl ? "

Need to change plans? Reschedule | Cancel

" : '' }}

Looking forward to speaking with you, {{ $json.guestName.split(' ')[0] }}! If you have any questions beforehand, reply to this email.

Best,
[REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_NAME]
[REPLACE_WITH_COMPANY_NAME]

nodes.name: Send Guest Confirmation
nodes.notes: CUSTOMIZE: Edit the preparation tips and email signature. Replace all [REPLACE_WITH_*] placeholders.

parameters.subject: 📅 New Booking: {{ $json.guestName }} — {{ $json.formattedDate }} at {{ $json.formattedTime }}
parameters.message:
New Meeting Booked

Booking ID{{ $json.bookingId }}
Guest Name{{ $json.guestName }}
Guest Email{{ $json.guestEmail }}
Meeting{{ $json.meetingTitle }}
Date & Time{{ $json.formattedDate }} at {{ $json.formattedTime }}
Join URL{{ $json.meetingUrl || 'Not set' }}

nodes.name: Notify Meeting Host
nodes.notes: SETUP: Replace REPLACE_WITH_HOST_EMAIL with the meeting host's email address.

nodes.name: Log Booking to Sheet
nodes.notes: SETUP: Create 'Bookings' tab in your Google Sheet with appropriate column headers.

nodes.name: Daily 8AM - Send Reminders
nodes.notes: Second trigger path: runs every morning to send 24-hour-ahead reminders to guests. This is separate from the booking confirmation flow above.

nodes.name: Get Tomorrow's Bookings
nodes.notes: Reads all bookings to filter for tomorrow's meetings.

nodes.name: Filter Tomorrow's Meetings
nodes.notes: Only sends reminder emails for meetings happening in the next 24 hours.

parameters.subject: ⏰ Reminder: Your meeting tomorrow at {{ $json.Time }}
parameters.message:
Your meeting is tomorrow! ⏰

Hi {{ $json.Guest_Name.split(' ')[0] }}, just a reminder about your upcoming meeting:

{{ $json.Join_URL ? "" : '' }}
Meeting{{ $json.Meeting_Title }}
Date{{ $json.Date }}
Time{{ $json.Time }} ({{ $json.Timezone }})
Join LinkClick to join

See you tomorrow!

[REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_NAME]
[REPLACE_WITH_COMPANY_NAME]

nodes.name: Send 24h Reminder
nodes.notes: Sends a 24-hour reminder to each guest with their meeting details and join link.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, bookingId: $json.bookingId, message: 'Booking confirmed' }) }}

nodes.name: Booking Webhook Response
nodes.notes: Returns confirmation to the booking platform.

motionElevation.description: Dual-trigger workflow: (1) Instant booking confirmation to guest + host notification + logging when a meeting is booked. (2) Daily 8AM reminder emails for next-day meetings. Integrates with Calendly, Cal.com, TidyCal, or any webhook-capable scheduler.
